pattern.imageEvidence: artist painting decorative window lettering and mural shapes on storefront glass with tools nearby
pattern.styleContract: Creative and precise with surface proof, real storefront painting evidence, signmaker-red action accents, and a project ticket as the signature move.

tagline: Walls and windows with hand-painted character.

hero.title: LetterLoom mural and window lettering hero image
hero.alt: An artist painting decorative shapes on a storefront window with brushes, paint kit, ladder, and drop cloth nearby.

contact.serviceArea: Window lettering, small murals, storefront graphics, menu wall accents, office murals, seasonal glass art, surface refreshes, and local hand-painted installs across town

copy.eyebrow: Murals and window lettering with surface-smart planning
copy.heroTitle: Turn a blank wall or window into a place people notice.
copy.heroText: LetterLoom designs and paints murals, window lettering, and storefront moments with sketches, surface prep, installation timing, and a clean handoff.
copy.introTitle: Good lettering starts with the glass, wall, and viewing distance.
copy.introText: We ask about surface material, sun exposure, lease rules, brand colors, rough size, and whether the piece needs to be temporary or permanent.
copy.proofTitle: Surface proof before the first stroke
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to start a wall or window?
copy.quoteText: Send surface photos, dimensions, location, timing, and the kind of message or mood you need. We will suggest a project path and next step.

services.title: Window Lettering
services.text: Hand-painted seasonal, permanent, or removable window moments planned around glass, glare, and viewing distance.

services.title: Small Murals
services.text: Interior or exterior mural accents, brand walls, menu moments, and photo corners with sketch approval.

services.title: Surface Refresh
services.text: Touch-ups, repainting, color updates, or a new painted layer for a tired wall or window.

process.title: Send surface photos
process.text: Dimensions, material, sun, location, and access shape the project faster than a long brief.

process.title: Approve the sketch
process.text: We confirm scale, color, wording or non-text forms, and installation timing before paint day.

process.title: Paint and hand off
process.text: The surface gets prepped, painted cleanly, photographed, and handed off with care notes.

proof.label: glass, wall, and light reviewed early
scale and style approved before install
